title: ZMiracle (MIRACULOUS) RABBIT MIRACULOUS
body:
- Hi, this is the ZMiracle mod. This mod is dedicated to the cartoon series LadyBug and Cat Noir. The mod is early, but it will develop quickly! (The mod supports survival)

- Compatible with optifine

- The mod adds Kwami to the game, which make it possible to transform into a hero. Kwami come from Miraculous Jewelry that can be created thanks to a Grimoir. (it is advised to use JEI for crafting)

- Also in mod there is a full localization of the Russian language and a choice of suit and camouflage - /zmenu

> Key Bing:
1. Z - Detransformation
2. X - Transformation
3. C - Power
4. V - Hide/Show kwami
5. B - Renounce
6. N - Weapon Mode

- Rabbit update last. Mod closed. I`m sorry
